item.title: LSL Healthcare Inc.: LSL Healthcare, Foley Urine Collection Kit, Model/Catalog Number: 1555 Recall
item.product: LSL Healthcare, Foley Urine Collection Kit, Model/Catalog Number: 1555
item.summary: Medical procedure kits were distributed containing Webcol Large Alcohol Prep Pads which were subsequently recalled for non-sterility. Product details: LSL Healthcare, Foley Urine Collection Kit, Model/Catalog Number: 1555
item.affectedPeople: US Nationwide distribution in the states of MD, IL, MN.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
